files.patch:
@@ -36,12 +36,0 @@
-    - name: 'Get CRIU URL configuration'
-      id: criu_url
-      uses: ./.github/actions/config
-      with:
-        var: LINUX_X64_CRIU_URL
-
-    - name: 'Get CRIU SHA256 configuration'
-      id: criu_sha256
-      uses: ./.github/actions/config
-      with:
-        var: LINUX_X64_CRIU_SHA256
-
@@ -52,2 +40,2 @@
-        path: ~/criu/criu
-        key: criu-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.criu_url.outputs.value }}
+        path: /usr/sbin/criu
+        key: criu-${{ runner.os }}
@@ -55,1 +43,1 @@
-    - name: Download CRIU
+    - name: Install CRIU
@@ -57,7 +45,6 @@
-        CRIU_URL=${{ steps.criu_url.outputs.value }}
-        CRIU_FILENAME=$(basename $CRIU_URL)
-        wget --progress=dot:mega $CRIU_URL
-        echo "${{ steps.criu_sha256.outputs.value }} $CRIU_FILENAME" | sha256sum -c >/dev/null -
-        mkdir -p criu/
-        tar -xf $CRIU_FILENAME -C criu
-        mv $(find criu/ -type f -name criu) criu/criu
+        export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
+        sudo apt-get update
+        sudo apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y software-properties-common
+        sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:criu/ppa
+        sudo apt-get update
+        sudo apt-get install -y criu
@@ -65,1 +52,1 @@
-      if: steps.criu.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
+      if: steps.criu_cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
@@ -67,1 +54,1 @@
-    - name: Setup CRIU
+    - name: Set SUID bit on CRIU
@@ -69,4 +56,1 @@
-        JDK_CRIU=${{ inputs.jdk-path }}/lib/criu
-        cp criu/criu $JDK_CRIU
-        sudo chown root:root $JDK_CRIU
-        sudo chmod u+s $JDK_CRIU
+        sudo chmod u+s /usr/sbin/criu

@@ -3,1 +3,1 @@
-## Build
+## Prerequisites
@@ -5,1 +5,5 @@
-CRaC JDK have extended build procedure.
+CRaC uses a pluggable mechanism for process snapshotting (checkpoint); currently this is implemented on Linux using the [CRIU](https://criu.org) project. Please install a recent version of CRIU (4.0+) using your package manager, or build it from sources.
+
+### Granting privileges
+
+Checkpoint or restore requires privileges (capabilities) normally belonging only to the `root` user. If you are not running your Java application using the `root` user, you need to grant the privileges to the CRIU binary by setting the SUID bit:
@@ -7,8 +11,0 @@
-1. Build JDK as usual
-```
-bash configure
-make images
-mv build/linux-x86_64-server-release/images/jdk/ .
-```
-2. Download a build of [modified CRIU](https://github.com/CRaC/criu/releases/tag/release-1.4)
-3. Extract and copy `criu` binary over a same named file in the JDK
@@ -16,1 +12,2 @@
-cp criu-dist/sbin/criu jdk/lib/criu
+sudo chown root:root /usr/sbin/criu
+sudo chmod u+s /usr/sbin/criu
@@ -18,1 +15,4 @@
-Grant permissions to allow regular user to run it
+
+### Legacy CRIU
+
+Historically the CRaC project maintained a [fork of CRIU](https://github.com/CRaC/criu/releases) with modifications for CRaC. The maintenance of this fork is discontinued; if you need to use the version from this fork please add this to the VM options:
@@ -20,2 +20,1 @@
-sudo chown root:root jdk/lib/criu
-sudo chmod u+s jdk/lib/criu
+-XX:CRaCEngineOptions=criu_location=/path/to/criu,legacy_criu=true
@@ -24,1 +23,1 @@
-# JDK
+## Build

@@ -361,21 +361,0 @@
-
-################################################################################
-# Setup CRaC CRIU
-################################################################################
-AC_DEFUN_ONCE([LIB_SETUP_CRIU_CRAC],
-[
-  AC_ARG_WITH(criu-crac, [AS_HELP_STRING([--with-criu-crac],
-      [use specified criu binary for CRaC implementation])])
-
-  AC_MSG_CHECKING([for criu-crac])
-
-  USE_CRIU_CRAC=
-  if test -f "${with_criu_crac}"; then
-    USE_CRIU_CRAC="${with_criu_crac}"
-    AC_MSG_RESULT([exists])
-  else
-    AC_MSG_RESULT([none])
-  fi
-
-  AC_SUBST(USE_CRIU_CRAC)
-])

@@ -27,1 +27,0 @@
-import jdk.test.lib.Platform;
@@ -72,3 +71,1 @@
-            // TODO: use more official image
-            String baseImage = Platform.isMusl() ? "ghcr.io/crac/test-base-musl" : "ghcr.io/crac/test-base";
-            builder.withBaseImage(baseImage, "latest")
+            builder

@@ -46,6 +46,1 @@
-        final var builder = new CracBuilder().engine(CracEngine.CRIU)
-            // Disabling direct_map to be able to overwrite the first image,
-            // otherwise the second image will depend on the first one,
-            // and we will get errors on the second restore
-            .vmOption("-XX:CRaCEngineOptions=direct_map=false");
-
+        final var builder = new CracBuilder().engine(CracEngine.CRIU);
